svg.aria-label: Four supermarket checkout lanes, three open and one closed for a break
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="analogy-checkout-lanes"><mxGraphModel dx="900" dy="420" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="360" math="0" shadow="0" background="#0b1020"> <root> <mxCell id="0"/> <mxCell id="1" parent="0"/> <mxCell id="title" value="Maintenance: only one lane closes at a time" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#eef2ff;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="24" width="700" height="28" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="sub" value="Never all of them — someone always stays open to serve." style="text;html=1;align=left;fontSize=13;fontColor=#9aa6c8;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="54" width="700" height="20" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="o1" value="OPEN" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0d1a13;strokeColor=#27624a;fontColor=#34d399;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=bottom;spacingBottom=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="48" y="96" width="180" height="210" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="o1c" value="" style="ellipse;fillColor=#1f6f52;strokeColor=#34d399;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="116" y="128" width="44" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0d1a13;strokeColor=#27624a;fontColor=#34d399;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=bottom;spacingBottom=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="248" y="96" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0d1a13;strokeColor=#27624a;fontColor=#34d399;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=bottom;spacingBottom=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="448" y="96" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#241318;strokeColor=#7a3340;fontColor=#ef4444;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=bottom;spacingBottom=10;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="648" y="96" svg.text: Maintenance: only one lane closes at a time
Never all of them — someone always stays open to serve.
